methods.name: Pi
methods.description: Return the IEEE-754 single-precision value of π (3.14159265…) in DR0.
comments: load self-data-R cap (c-list[0]) into CR0 — grants read-only access to embedded data words
read data word [0] (π = 3.14159265…) via CR0 into DR0
return π in DR0 to caller

methods.name: E
methods.description: Return the IEEE-754 single-precision value of e (2.71828182…) in DR0.
comments: load self-data-R cap (c-list[0]) into CR0 — grants read-only access to embedded data words
read data word [1] (e = 2.71828182…) via CR0 into DR0
return e in DR0 to caller

methods.name: Phi
methods.description: Return the IEEE-754 single-precision golden ratio φ (1.61803398…) in DR0.
comments: load self-data-R cap (c-list[0]) into CR0 — grants read-only access to embedded data words
read data word [2] (φ = 1.61803398…) via CR0 into DR0
return φ in DR0 to caller

methods.name: Zero
methods.description: Return IEEE-754 positive zero (0.0) in DR0.
comments: load self-data-R cap (c-list[0]) into CR0 — grants read-only access to embedded data words
read data word [3] (0.0) via CR0 into DR0

methods.name: One
comments: load self-data-R cap (c-list[0]) into CR0 — grants read-only access to embedded data words
read data word [4] (1.0) via CR0 into DR0

methods.name: Add
methods.description: Store a user-supplied 32-bit value XYZ in the next free pool slot and return a sealed, read-only Abstract GT capability pointing to that slot. Returns FAULT if the pool (14 slots) is full.
inputs: DR0: XYZ — any IEEE-754 or raw 32-bit value to store
outputs: CR0: Abstract GT (type=3, R-only) to the allocated pool slot; FAULT if full
comments: load pool-W GT (c-list[1]) into CR1 — grants write access to the 14-word user constant pool
write XYZ (DR0) to pool slot offset 0 via CR1; bindMethod intercepts to scan the bitmap, place value, and mark slot as occupied
return: Abstract GT (sealed R-only handle to the allocated pool slot) is placed in CR0 by bindMethod before this RETURN executes
